hero.subtitle: BriefXtract uses Intelligent Document Processing to automate case preparation for debt counselors — cutting case prep from 8 hours to 15 minutes.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Every client arrives with a box of chaos.
problem.hoursDesc: Debt counselors in Germany manually sort and transcribe chaotic paper mail — letters, court orders, invoices — before any actual counseling can begin.
problem.debtDesc: 1,400 counseling centers, 4,000+ counselors — all overwhelmed by the sheer volume of unsorted paper correspondence from creditors.

features.label: BriefXtract Platform
features.extractionDesc: Our AI engine extracts creditor name, file number, amount, and due date from mixed PDFs — letters, court orders, invoices — automatically and in one pass.
features.gdprDesc: Client data never trains AI models. Hosted in Germany with church data protection law compliance built in.
features.urgencyDesc: Eviction notices, court deadlines, and enforcement orders are automatically detected and surfaced with visual priority alerts.
features.caseEngineDesc: Automatically links disparate documents — e.g., a Vodafone invoice and a Riverty collection letter — into a single unified debt case record.
features.fasterDesc: What used to take 1–8 hours per client now takes 15 minutes. Counselors reclaim capacity for the people, not the paperwork.
features.vivendiDesc: Export structured data to your preferred format or connect directly to your existing case management system via API — no manual re-entry required.

beforeAfter.label: The Transformation
beforeAfter.title: What changes with BriefXtract.
beforeAfter.before2: Type data into Vivendi by hand
beforeAfter.before3: No way to flag urgent notices
beforeAfter.before5: Bottleneck limits how many clients are seen
beforeAfter.after1: Upload a PDF — AI handles the rest

security.label: Enterprise Security
security.title: Built for the strictest standards in Germany.
security.subtitle: Every architecture decision was made with German data protection law in mind — not as an afterthought.
security.gdprDesc: Full data processing agreement (DPA) available on request. BriefInsights processes client data in full compliance with EU GDPR requirements.
security.hostingDesc: All data is processed on AWS infrastructure within the EU. No data leaves the EU. Ever.
security.retentionDesc: Documents are permanently deleted immediately after processing. Nothing is stored, indexed, or used for AI training.
security.churchDesc: KDG (Catholic) and DSG-EKD (Protestant) compliant. Purpose-built for Caritas, Diakonie, and AWO centers.
security.encryptionDesc: TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest. Your clients’ sensitive financial data is protected at every step.
security.infraDesc: Built on enterprise-grade AI cloud infrastructure with no data training, full auditability, and 99.9% uptime SLA.

testimonials.label: What Counselors Say
testimonials.title: Real impact. Real counselors.
testimonials.quote1: BriefXtract reduced our case preparation from half a day to under 20 minutes. Our counselors now spend their time on what matters most — talking to clients.
testimonials.quote2: The zero-data-retention policy was critical for us. Our clients’ financial data is among the most sensitive there is. BriefInsights understood that from day one.
testimonials.quote3: We were skeptical about AI in social work. But BriefXtract is invisible — it just handles the paperwork. Our counselors work exactly as they always have.

roi.label: The Business Case
roi.title: The math speaks for itself.
roi.subtitle: For an average counseling center with 10 staff, BriefXtract pays for itself many times over — and gives counselors their time back.
roi.calc_assumption: Based on avg. 4h manual prep reduced to 15 min with BriefXtract, over 48 working weeks.
roi.disclaimer: *Estimates based on German federal debt counseling statistics (BAGFW, 2024). Actual savings vary by organization size and current process maturity.

footer.tagline: Empowering social workers by automating administrative burdens.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Built for the people who help people.
about.mission: BriefInsights was founded in Berlin with one mission: eliminate administrative burden for social workers so they can spend more time with the people who need them most.
about.team: Our team combines expertise in AI, legal tech, and social work to build tools that comply with the strictest German data protection standards.
about.teamPlaceholderBio: Brief bio and background coming soon.
